arts.ttl: Guardiola shuffles the pack for Plymouth FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has made 11 changes to his City starting XI for Saturday's FA Cup fifth round tie with Plymouth Argyle. CITY XI : Ortega Moreno, Lewis, Reis, Ake, O’Reilly, Gundogan, De Bruyne (C), McAtee, Bernardo, Grealish, Foden

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Plymouth confirmed XIs: Echeverri, Haaland, De Bruyne decisions made
